en: I had it all. I had a stairway that was very decent,
ko: 나는 모든 것을 가졌었다. 꽤 괜찮은 계단이 있었고,

en: a wardrobe that was getting very respectable.
I was close to being complete.
Shit, man. Now it's all gone.
All gone.
All gone.
Do you know what a duvet is?
Comfort.
It's a blanket. Just a blanket.
Now, why do guys like you and I know what a duvet is?
ko: 그런데 왜 우리 같은 남자들이 이불이 뭔지 아는 걸까?

en: Is this essential to our survival?
In the hunter-gatherer sense of the word?
No.
What are we, then?
I don't know. Consumers.
Right. We are consumers.
We are byproducts of a lifestyle obsession.
Murder, crime, poverty.
These things don't concern me.
What concerns me are celebrity magazines,
television with 500 channels,
some guy's name on my underwear.
ko: 내 속옷에 적힌 어떤 남자의 이름.

en: Rogaine, Viagra, Olestra.
Martha Stewart.
Fuck Martha Stewart.
Martha's polishing the brass on the top.
